title: Alibaba launches Qwen 3.8, an open-source AI model that rivals ChatGPT and Claude
summary: The Chinese Qwen 3.8 model is available as open source and has surprised with its performance, competing with Western leaders.

title: Moonshot AI suspends new subscriptions for Kimi K3 due to extremely high demand for the model
summary: The Kimi K3 language model has generated massive demand, forcing the company to suspend new subscriptions, and has shown superior performance in frontend code tests.

title: The new 10-core AMD Medusa Point APU surpasses all x86 mobile chips in single-core performance on Geekbench
summary: Leaks show that the Zen6 processor achieves a score 28% higher than the Zen5 HX 370.

title: A $5 ESP32 dongle blocks 537,000 domains as ads using only 50KB of RAM
summary: The firmware responds to blocked DNS queries in 10 milliseconds, offering an ultra-cheap ad blocking solution.

title: Samsung eliminates 739 jobs in New Jersey as it moves its headquarters to Texas while its chip division posts record profits
summary: The company reduces its consumer electronics workforce in the US ahead of moving its headquarters to Texas.
